## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --features alloc` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] New public API has doc comments and a `# Examples` block
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
